## Contributing to GCC

Thanks for taking the time to contribute!  This repository is a fork of GCC and accepts contributions via GitHub pull requests.  Upstream GCC still relies on mailing lists for development, so please see ["Contributing to GCC"](https://gcc.gnu.org/contribute.html) for details on licensing and coding standards.

### Contribution workflow

1. Fork this repository on GitHub and clone your fork.
2. Create a feature branch from `main` for your work.
3. Build the project with CMake and run `ctest` to ensure everything passes.
4. Open a pull request against `main` with a clear description of your changes.

We welcome pull requests that follow GCC's coding conventions and licensing requirements. Thank you for helping to improve this fork!
